steps.title: Relate cosine to sides
steps.content: Since angle $B$ is a right angle, $AC$ is the hypotenuse. For angle $A$, $AB$ is adjacent and $BC$ is opposite.

steps.title: Use the side ratio
steps.content:
The given cosine value means
$$
\frac{AB}{AC}=\frac{3}{5}
$$
This is a right-triangle side ratio where $BC$ corresponds to $4$ parts.

steps.title: Scale the adjacent side
steps.content: Use $BC=152$ to find the scale, then find $AB$. $$ 4k=152 $$ $$ k=38 $$ $$ AB=3(38)=114 $$ The answer is B.
